title: List of common key skills in Finance and Accounting domain.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: List of common key skills in Finance and Accounting domain.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
1. Financial analysis and forecasting
2. Budgeting and cost management
3. Financial reporting and compliance
4. Taxation and regulatory compliance
5. Auditing and internal control
6. Risk management and credit analysis
7. Investment management and portfolio analysis
8. Financial modelling and valuation
9. Accounting principles and standards
10. Advanced Excel and data analysis skills
11. Treasury and cash flow management
12. Interpersonal and communication skills
13. Leadership and team management
14. Strategic thinking and decision-making
15. Business acumen and commercial awareness.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Align below skills on basis of learning beginner to advance.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text:
The order of skills from beginner to advance may vary depending on personal experience and education. However, here's an attempt to align the skills in a general beginner to advance order:

1. Accounting principles and standards
2. Interpersonal and communication skills
3. Advanced Excel and data analysis skills
4. Financial reporting and compliance
5. Financial analysis and forecasting
6. Budgeting and cost management
7. Taxation and regulatory compliance
8. Auditing and internal control
9. Risk management and credit analysis
10. Investment management and portfolio analysis
11. Financial modelling and valuation
12. Treasury and cash flow management
13. Leadership and team management
14. Strategic thinking and decision-making
15. Business acumen and commercial awareness. 

Note: This is a subjective list and may vary depending on personal opinion and experience.
